certificate_authority_arn.description: ARN of the certificate authority to issue the certificate, required if using private CA.

certificate_body.description: PEM-encoded certificate body for the ACM certificate; must include the public key certificate.

certificate_chain.description: Certificate chain in PEM format, including intermediate certificates, required for certificate validation.

domain_name.description: Fully qualified domain name (FQDN) for the certificate; must be a valid domain that you own or control.

early_renewal_duration.description: Defines the number of days before expiration to automatically renew the certificate, ensuring uninterrupted service.

key_algorithm.description: Specifies the key algorithm used when requesting the certificate; must be either RSA_2048, RSA_4096, or EC_prime256v1.

options.description: Specifies additional certificate options, such as enabling or disabling certificate transparency logging.

private_key.description: Private key used for the certificate request; must be in PEM format.

subject_alternative_names.description: Additional domain names to be included in the certificate, such as subdomains; must be fully qualified domain names.

tags.description: Defines key-value pairs to categorize and organize the ACM certificate; keys must be unique and values can be null, but should align with AWS tagging standards.

validation_method.description: Method used to validate the domain for the certificate; must be one of "EMAIL" or "DNS".

validation_option.description: Specifies the method for validating the certificate, such as DNS or EMAIL.
